---
title: "I want to understand AI and ethics"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: understand-guidance
    contents: guidance/posts
    type: default
    include:
      categories: "*ethics*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: understand-tools
    contents: tools/posts
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: "*ethics*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    grid-columns: 2
---

::: {.story-hero}
This pathway highlights content tagged around **ethics**, **key principles**, and further reading so you can build a stronger understanding of AI before applying it.
:::

## Core guidance

:::{#understand-guidance}
:::

## Further reading and resources

:::{#understand-tools}
:::

[Back to the homepage](index.qmd)
